subject: [VNFSDK] Use common secret template for postgres credentials
commit_message:
[VNFSDK] Use common secret template for postgres credentials

Even through we use common secret template both passwords are still
hardcoded in common postgres chart but this will be removed as a final
step just like we did for mariadb-galera.

Issue-ID: OOM-2250
Change-Id: I4ca210c99c27fbfbf74a467d72a81b2e38d8d800
Signed-off-by: Krzysztof Opasiak <k.opasiak@samsung.com>

entries.message:

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+2

working in one patchset? it's suspicious :P
waiting for @kanagaraj +1

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review+2
> 
> working in one patchset? it's suspicious :P

I already smelled the issue:D

VNFSDK is broken by design. Pod never fails even if the postgres password is bad;)
I'm not sure if healthcheck checks anything more...

It "should" work as I'm overriding a file that used to be hardcoded (together with passwords) in the container but you never know...

> waiting for @kanagaraj +1

I also count on @Kanagaraj to check if everything works fine;)

Patch Set 1:

Hi Krzysztof, thank you for addressing this issue and i am ok. But i would like to get integration team suggession on this change, by considering the current milestone time-line. so added Morgan into reviewer list.
Hi Morgan, can you please provide your sugesstion. thank you
Change has been successfully merged by Morgan Richomme
